doc_class_description: A Court of Appeal judgment is a higher court ruling that reviews decisions of lower courts, shaping legal precedent and protecting citizens’ rights.

latest_doc_d.description: Alayadivembu Livestock and Dairy Farmers Agriculture Co-op Society Limited and Others Vs Seenithamby Annathurai and Others before Hon. Dhammika Ganepola, J.
latest_doc_d.parties: Alayadivembu Livestock and Dairy Farmers Agriculture Co-op Society Limited and Others Vs Seenithamby Annathurai and Others
latest_doc_d.keywords: Writ of Mandamus, Writ of Certiorari, Emergency regulations, Public Security Ordinance, Ultra vires, suppression of material facts, public duty
latest_doc_d.legistation: Public Security Ordinance No 25 of 1947, Emergency (Pasture Lands) Regulations, Pasture Lands (Reservation and Development) Act No. 4 of 1983, Land Development Ordinance No. 19 of 1935 (as amended)
